name: Portgas.D.Ace (Manga)
effect_text: [On Play] Give up to 2 of your opponent's Characters -3000 power during this turn. Then, if your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains [Rush] during this turn. (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set without the original textured foil.
